title: crotalaria scabrella
intro: Crotalaria scabrella, also known as the prickly rattlebox, is a plant species belonging to the pea family (Fabaceae) that is native to tropical Africa and Asia. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Crotalaria scabrella include its ability to treat various ailments, such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its use as an antidote for snake bites. Herbal preparations of Crotalaria scabrella include teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are often used in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
